title: 3GPP Change Request Cover Page
description: Schema for 3GPP Change Request (CR) cover page

TDoc Number.description: Document number indicating the group and a running number that starts with the year (e.g., 'RP-240123', 'R3-1234567', 'SP-263456')

rev.description: Revision number of the CR (0 to 99). Omit or use 0 for initial submission

Release.description: 3GPP Release number targeted by this CR (e.g., 17, 18, 19). Will be displayed as 'Rel-N' in the output.

Affected.description: Indicates which network elements are affected by this change

UICC.description: Universal Integrated Circuit Card (SIM card) is affected

Radio Access Network.description: Radio Access Network (base stations) is affected

Title.description: Short descriptive title of the change request

Source to WG.description: Source company/companies when submitting to Working Group. It should be absent when the CR is submitted directly to the TSG.

Source to TSG.description: Source company/companies when submitting to Technical Specification Group

Work item code.description:
Related work item code(s). Common 6G work items:
- FS_6GSpecs: Study on Modernization of Specification Format and Procedures for 6G
- FS_6G_REQ: Study on 6G Use Cases and Service Requirements
- FS_6G_RAN_Scen_Req: Study on 6G Scenarios and Requirements
- FS_6G_ARC: Study on Architecture for 6G System
- FS_6G_Radio: Study on 6G Radio
- FS_6G_APP: Study on 6G Application Enablement
- FS_6G_SEC: Study on Security for the 6G System
- FS_6G_MED: Study on Media Aspects for 6G System
- FS_6G_CH: Study on Charging Aspects of 6G System
- FS_6G_OAM: Study on 6G Management and Orchestration
- FS_6G_LI: Study on Lawful Interception for 6G
- FS_6G_CPCN_CT: Study on Control Plane Protocols in Core Network of the 6G System
- FS_6G_UPCN_CT: Study on Protocol aspects for User Plane in Core Network of 6G System
- FS_6G_ResRel_CT: Study on Resilience and Reliability in Core Network of the 6G System
- FS_6G_NAS_CT: Study on NAS protocol for 6G System
- TEI: Technical Enhancements and Improvements
Other work item codes are also allowed.

Date.description: Date when the CR was submitted (YYYY-MM-DD format)

Category.description: CR category: A=Correction, B=Addition, C=Functional modification, D=Editorial, F=Correction (not affecting implementations)

Reason for change.description: Detailed explanation of why this change is needed
examples: The current specification is ambiguous regarding...
A new feature is required to support...

Summary of change.description: Concise summary of what is being changed

Impact analysis.description: Analysis of implementation impact, e.g., if only one side implements the change. This information, if provided, will be added to the 'Summary of change' section.

UE implements - RAN does not.description: Impact if UE implements but RAN does not

RAN implements - UE does not.description: Impact if RAN implements but UE does not

Consequences if not approved.description: What happens if this CR is not approved
examples: Ambiguity remains in the specification, which may lead to...

Clauses affected.description: List of specification clauses (sections) affected by this change

Other specs affected.description: Other specifications that are affected by this change

Other core specifications.description: List of other core specifications affected (format: 'TS/TR number' and 'CR number')

Test specifications.description: List of test specifications affected (format: 'TS/TR number' and 'CR number')

O&M Specifications.description: List of Operations & Maintenance specifications affected (format: 'TS/TR number' and 'CR number')
